---
title: "Template for text books"
author: "Author"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%B %d, %Y')`"
description: "This book introduces..."
cover-image: "img/cover.png"
favicon: "img/favicon.ico"
site: bookdown::bookdown_site
output: 
  bookdown::gitbook:
    split_by: section
    css: fmt/styles.css
    fig_width: 7
    fig_height: 6
    fig_caption: true
    mathjax: default
    config:
      toc:
        collapse: subsection
        scroll_highlight: yes
        before: null
        after: null
      toolbar:
        position: fixed
      edit : null
      download: no
      search: yes
      fontsettings:
        theme: white
        family: sans
        size: 2
      sharing: null
documentclass: book
csl: fmt/vancouver.csl
bibliography: ref.bib
link-citations: yes
---


# Book introduction {-}
